cards.name: 8 of Wands
cards.interpretation: movement, speed, progress, quick decisions, sudden changes, excitement

cards.name: Ace of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: delays, blocks, lack of passion, lack of energy, hesitancy, creative blocks

cards.name: Page of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: emotional vulnerability, immaturity, neglecting inner child, escapism, insecurity
